net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl

Class SimulationPropertiesImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.BasicNotifierImpl
      • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.BasicEObjectImpl
        • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl
          • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
            • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl.SimulationPropertiesImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SimulationProperties, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EStructuralFeature.Internal.DynamicValueHolder, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.InternalEObject

    public class SimulationPropertiesImpl
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
implements SimulationProperties
    An implementation of the model object 'Simulation Properties'.

    The following features are implemented:

    • Scale
    • Frames Per Second
    • Use Preset Settings
    • Simulate Without UI
    • Number Of Simulation Loops
    • Random Sort Between Loops
    • Use Foldable Seats
    • Bring Your Own Seat
    • Results
    • Sorting
    • Simulation Speed Factor
    • Seat Interference Standing Up Passenger Waiting Time
    • Seat Interference Process Time
    • Thread Sleep Time Default
    • Developer Mode
    • Luggage Properties
    • Passenger Properties
    • Passengers Boarding Per Minute
